title: Mineirella geraniifolia
taxonomy: Mineirella geraniifolia is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to Brazil and is also known as the 'Geranium-leaf Mineirella'. The classification of Mineirella geraniifolia typically includes the kingdom Plantae, the clade Angiosperms, the clade Eudicots, and the order Asterales. It is further classified as being in the family Asteraceae and the tribe Vernonieae. Mineirella geraniifolia's classification provides insight into its evolutionary relationships and characteristics within the plant kingdom.
